_comment: SST conservative-PDES benchmark — 16-component ring on simpleElementExample.basicLinks.
Sized to ~60s wall at 4 MPI ranks on a typical dev machine (18M events per component).
Resilient run uses --checkpoint-sim-period=4ms (about 4-5 checkpoints over the 18ms sim time).
small-low rationale: kill at 30s lands deep in the timed loop with multiple checkpoint boundaries already saved.
